title: universal-chart values
description: Schema for Origo universal-chart values validation

releasePrefix.description: Prefix prepended to all resource names. Leave empty to disable.

defaultImage.description: Fallback container image used when a workload omits image.

defaultImageTag.description: Fallback container image tag. Always quote numeric tags.

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secret names referenced in every pod spec.

defaults.description: Default settings applied to all workload templates.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource name generation.

persistentVolumes.description: Kubernetes PersistentVolume resources (cluster-scoped). Thin passthrough — spec goes directly to the resource.

extraDeploy.description: Raw Kubernetes manifests keyed by name. Values support Helm template expressions.

autoService.description: Auto-generated Service override for workload ports shorthand.

type.description: Service type for the auto-generated Service.

clusterIP.description: ClusterIP to assign. Set to None for headless services.

externalTrafficPolicy.description: External traffic policy for NodePort/LoadBalancer auto-services.

loadBalancerClass.description: LoadBalancer implementation class for the auto-generated Service.

allocateLoadBalancerNodePorts.description: Whether to allocate node ports for LoadBalancer auto-services.

loadBalancerSourceRanges.description: CIDRs allowed to access LoadBalancer auto-services.

healthCheckNodePort.description: Health check node port for auto-generated Services with externalTrafficPolicy: Local.

externalIPs.description: External IPs that route to auto-generated Service endpoints.

publishNotReadyAddresses.description: Publish not-ready pod addresses in the auto-generated Service.

sessionAffinity.description: Session affinity mode for the auto-generated Service.

sessionAffinityConfig.description: Session affinity configuration for the auto-generated Service.

ipFamilies.description: IP families for the auto-generated Service.

ipFamilyPolicy.description: IP family policy for the auto-generated Service.

externalTrafficPolicy.description: External traffic policy for NodePort/LoadBalancer services.

clusterIP.description: ClusterIP to assign. Set to None for headless services.

externalName.description: External DNS name for ExternalName services.

allocateLoadBalancerNodePorts.description: Whether to allocate node ports for LoadBalancer services.

loadBalancerSourceRanges.description: CIDRs allowed to access LoadBalancer services.

healthCheckNodePort.description: Health check node port for LoadBalancer services with externalTrafficPolicy: Local.

externalIPs.description: External IPs that route to Service endpoints.

selector.description: Explicit Service selector labels. Used verbatim when set. ExternalName services omit selectors.

workload.description: Target workload name for component-level pod selection. Defaults to the service key name when selector is not explicitly set.

startingDeadlineSeconds.description: Deadline in seconds for starting the job if it misses its scheduled time.

successfulJobsHistoryLimit.description: Number of successful finished jobs to retain.

failedJobsHistoryLimit.description: Number of failed finished jobs to retain.

commandDurationAlert.description: Seconds threshold — creates a PrometheusRule that fires when CronJob execution exceeds this duration.
Seconds threshold — creates a PrometheusRule that fires when Job execution exceeds this duration.

resources.description: Container resource requests/limits. Must be an object with requests and/or limits.

topologySpreadConstraint.description: Topology spread constraint for pod scheduling.

healthCheck.description: Health check shorthand — generates liveness, readiness, and startup probes.

container.description: Container definition used in the containers list.

workload.description: Workload instance (Deployment, StatefulSet, DaemonSet, CronJob, Job, Hook).

ports.description: Single-container shorthand: map of name→port. Creates containerPorts and a Service.

securityContext.description: Deprecated alias for podSecurityContext. Prefer podSecurityContext for pod-level settings.

affinity.description: Custom pod affinity/anti-affinity rules. Overrides predefined affinity.

dnsPolicy.description: DNS policy for pods. Supports template expressions.

parallelism.description: Number of pods running at the same time (Jobs/Hooks).

activeDeadlineSeconds.description: Maximum duration in seconds before the Job is terminated.

backoffLimit.description: Number of retries before marking a Job as failed.

ttlSecondsAfterFinished.description: TTL for cleaning up finished Jobs.

progressDeadlineSeconds.description: Maximum time for a Deployment to make progress before considered failed.

service.description: Service override. Set false to suppress auto-service, or an object to customize.

serviceName.description: Governing service name for StatefulSets. Defaults to the workload key name.

imagePullSecrets.description: Deprecated: use extraImagePullSecrets instead. Image pull secret names for this workload.

extraImagePullSecrets.description: Additional image pull secrets for this workload, merged with top-level and defaults.

envConfigmaps.description: ConfigMap names to inject via envFrom.

envSecrets.description: Secret names to inject via envFrom.

envsFromConfigmap.description: Cherry-pick individual keys from ConfigMaps as env vars.

envsFromSecret.description: Cherry-pick individual keys from Secrets as env vars.

volumes.description: Typed volumes (configMap, secret, pvc, emptyDir, hostPath).

extraVolumes.description: Additional raw volumes appended to pod spec.

extraSelectorLabels.description: Additional selector labels for workload matching.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: Number of old ReplicaSets to retain.

startingDeadlineSeconds.description: Deadline in seconds for starting the job if it misses its scheduled time.

commandDurationAlert.description: Seconds threshold for PrometheusRule alert on long-running jobs.

autoChecksum.description: Enable/disable automatic checksum annotations for envConfigmaps/envSecrets.

minReadySeconds.description: Minimum seconds a pod should be ready before considered available.

podManagementPolicy.description: Pod management policy for StatefulSets (OrderedReady or Parallel).

successfulJobsHistoryLimit.description: Number of successful finished jobs to retain (CronJobs).

failedJobsHistoryLimit.description: Number of failed finished jobs to retain (CronJobs).

kind.description: Helm hook kind (e.g. pre-install,pre-upgrade). Used by hooks only.

weight.description: Helm hook weight. Used by hooks only.

deletePolicy.description: Helm hook delete policy. Used by hooks only.

preStopSleep.description: Seconds to sleep in preStop hook. Overrides defaults.preStopSleep for this workload.

hostNetwork.description: Use the host network namespace for this pod. Required for DaemonSets that sniff host traffic.

hostPID.description: Use the host PID namespace. Allows processes to see host-level PIDs.

shareProcessNamespace.description: Share a single process namespace between all containers in the pod.

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Controls whether a service account token is automatically mounted into the pod. Overrides the ServiceAccount-level default.

runtimeClassName.description: Name of the RuntimeClass object to use. Required for gVisor, Kata Containers, WASM runtimes, etc.

overhead.description: Resource overhead associated with running a pod (used by RuntimeClass).

readinessGates.description: Additional conditions to be evaluated for pod readiness.

schedulingGates.description: Scheduling gates that must be cleared before the pod is eligible for scheduling.

os.description: OS-specific settings for the pod (e.g. {name: linux} or {name: windows}).

workloadGeneral.description: Shared defaults for a workload kind (*General). Merged with per-instance values.

securityContext.description: Deprecated alias for podSecurityContext. Prefer podSecurityContext for pod-level settings.

affinity.description: Custom pod affinity/anti-affinity rules. Overrides predefined affinity.

dnsPolicy.description: DNS policy for pods. Supports template expressions.

envConfigmaps.description: Default ConfigMap names to inject via envFrom.

envSecrets.description: Default Secret names to inject via envFrom.

envsFromConfigmap.description: Default cherry-pick keys from ConfigMaps as env vars.

envsFromSecret.description: Default cherry-pick keys from Secrets as env vars.

autoChecksum.description: Enable/disable automatic checksum annotations for this workload kind.

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Controls whether a service account token is automatically mounted into pods of this kind.

runtimeClassName.description: Name of the RuntimeClass object to use.

overhead.description: Resource overhead for pods of this kind (used by RuntimeClass).

schedulingGates.description: Scheduling gates for pods of this kind.

os.description: OS-specific settings for pods of this kind.

deletePolicy.description: Default Helm hook delete policy for all hooks in this release (e.g. before-hook-creation,hook-succeeded).

kind.description: Default Helm hook kind for all hooks (e.g. pre-install,pre-upgrade).

weight.description: Default Helm hook weight for all hooks.

pvc.description: PersistentVolumeClaim instance. Set mountPath to auto-mount into workload containers.

mountPath.description: Auto-mount path in workload containers. Omit to skip auto-mounting.

subPath.description: Sub-path within the volume to mount.

keepOnDelete.description: Add helm.sh/resource-policy: keep to prevent deletion on helm uninstall.

workloads.description: If set, PVC volume/mount is only injected into workloads whose name matches an entry in this list. Empty list means inject into no workload.

selector.description: Label selector for PVC binding to a specific PV.

keepOnDelete.description: Add helm.sh/resource-policy: keep to prevent deletion on helm uninstall.

envEntry.description: Individual environment variable with support for valueFrom.

applicationName.description: Argo CD Application name to target.

namespace.description: Namespace where the Argo CD Application lives (default: argocd).
